'''鈭歠-f-s''' ('''fafasa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unable|unable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-f-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unable|unable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-f-s
|-
! Lemma
| fafasa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fafasithi|fafasithi]] || [[word:fafasiji|fafasiji]] || [[word:fafasishi|fafasishi]] || [[word:fafasi|fafasi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fafasuthuth|fafasuthuth]] || [[word:fafasujuj|fafasujuj]] || [[word:fafasushush|fafasushush]] || [[word:fafas|fafas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fafasuthu|fafasuthu]] || [[word:fafasuju|fafasuju]] || [[word:fafasushu|fafasushu]] || [[word:fafasu|fafasu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fafasufuth|fafasufuth]] || [[word:fafasufuj|fafasufuj]] || [[word:fafasufush|fafasufush]] || [[word:fafasuf|fafasuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fafasethe|fafasethe]] || [[word:fafaseje|fafaseje]] || [[word:fafaseshe|fafaseshe]] || [[word:fafase|fafase]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fafasothoth|fafasothoth]] || [[word:fafasojoj|fafasojoj]] || [[word:fafasoshosh|fafasoshosh]] || [[word:fafas|fafas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fafasotho|fafasotho]] || [[word:fafasojo|fafasojo]] || [[word:fafasosho|fafasosho]] || [[word:fafaso|fafaso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fafasofoth|fafasofoth]] || [[word:fafasofoj|fafasofoj]] || [[word:fafasofosh|fafasofosh]] || [[word:fafasof|fafasof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fafas忙th忙|fafas忙th忙]] || [[word:fafas忙j忙|fafas忙j忙]] || [[word:fafas忙sh忙|fafas忙sh忙]] || [[word:fafas忙|fafas忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fafasathath|fafasathath]] || [[word:fafasajaj|fafasajaj]] || [[word:fafasashash|fafasashash]] || [[word:fafas|fafas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fafasatha|fafasatha]] || [[word:fafasaja|fafasaja]] || [[word:fafasasha|fafasasha]] || [[word:fafasa|fafasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fafasafath|fafasafath]] || [[word:fafasafaj|fafasafaj]] || [[word:fafasafash|fafasafash]] || [[word:fafasaf|fafasaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:fafasasha|fafasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gofafasasha|gofafasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokifafasasha|gokifafasasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:fafasn眉sha|fafasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gofafasnkn眉sha|gofafasnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokifafasn眉sha|gokifafasn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fafash毛sha|fafash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofafasnksh毛sha|gofafasnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifafash毛sha|gokifafash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fafasrosha|fafasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofafasnkrosha|gofafasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifafasrosha|gokifafasrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fafasmusha|fafasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gofafasnkmusha|gofafasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafasmusha|gokifafasmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:fafasherasha|fafasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gofafasnksherasha|gofafasnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokifafasherasha|gokifafasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:fafasngasha|fafasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gofafasnkngasha|gofafasnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokifafasngasha|gokifafasngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fafasyasha|fafasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gofafasnkyasha|gofafasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokifafasyasha|gokifafasyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:fafasyamasha|fafasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gofafasnkyamasha|gofafasnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokifafasyamasha|gokifafasyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:fafasn眉sh毛sha|fafasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofafasnkn眉sh毛sha|gofafasnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifafasn眉sh毛sha|gokifafasn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fafasn眉rosha|fafasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofafasnkn眉rosha|gofafasnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifafasn眉rosha|gokifafasn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafasn眉musha|fafasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofafasnkn眉musha|gofafasnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafasn眉musha|gokifafasn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:fafash毛n眉sha|fafash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofafasnksh毛n眉sha|gofafasnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifafash毛n眉sha|gokifafash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fafash毛rosha|fafash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofafasnksh毛rosha|gofafasnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifafash毛rosha|gokifafash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafash毛musha|fafash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofafasnksh毛musha|gofafasnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafash毛musha|gokifafash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:fafasron眉sha|fafasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofafasnkron眉sha|gofafasnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifafasron眉sha|gokifafasron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:fafasrosh毛sha|fafasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofafasnkrosh毛sha|gofafasnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifafasrosh毛sha|gokifafasrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafasromusha|fafasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofafasnkromusha|gofafasnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafasromusha|gokifafasromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:fafasmun眉sha|fafasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gofafasnkmun眉sha|gofafasnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokifafasmun眉sha|gokifafasmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:fafasmush毛sha|fafasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gofafasnkmush毛sha|gofafasnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokifafasmush毛sha|gokifafasmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:fafasmurosha|fafasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofafasnkmurosha|gofafasnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokifafasmurosha|gokifafasmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:fafas|fafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:f忙f忙s|f忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hofafas|hofafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hof忙f忙s|hof忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohofafas|hohofafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohof忙f忙s|hohof忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉fafas|n眉fafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉f忙f忙s|n眉f忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉fafas|n眉n眉fafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉f忙f忙s|n眉n眉f忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂fafas|n茂fafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂f忙f忙s|n茂f忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂fafas|n茂n茂fafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂f忙f忙s|n茂n茂f忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lufafas|lufafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luf忙f忙s|luf忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulufafas|lulufafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluf忙f忙s|luluf忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lifafas|lifafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lif忙f忙s|lif忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilifafas|lilifafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilif忙f忙s|lilif忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kofafas|kofafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kof忙f忙s|kof忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokofafas|kokofafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokof忙f忙s|kokof忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kefafas|kefafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kef忙f忙s|kef忙f忙s]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekefafas|kekefafas]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekef忙f忙s|kekef忙f忙s]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
